title: Ubiquiti UDM-Pro-Max, Dream Machine Pro Max
category: Ubiquiti UDM-Pro-Max, Dream Machine Pro Max
description: UniFi Dream Machine Pro Max is an all-in-one solution (router, firewall and management of all UniFi devices) for networks in small and medium-sized companies with the possibility of redundancy powered by USP-RPS. It stands out for its very high performance, which doubles the previous models UDM-PRO and UDM-SE! . Thanks to higher computing power and larger RAM, you can manage up to 200 UniFi devices and serve up to 2000 connected clients The UDM-Pro-Max offers twice the performance of the UDM-Pro or UDM-SE models thanks to a Quad-core ARM Cortex-A57 processor with a frequency of 2GHz, 8GB RAM, 32GB eMMC for the system and 128GB SSD for recording NVR detections. Thanks to this HW equipment, it is not a problem to achieve a routing performance of up to 5 Gbps with the IDS/IPS function turned on (1) 10G SFP+ (1) 2.5 GbE RJ45 WAN ports (1) 10G SFP+, (8) GbE RJ45 LAN ports (2) HDD bays for 3.5" HDD Built-in 128GB SSD 1.3" touch screen 5Gbps routing performance with IDS/IPS Includes full UniFi application suite for device management Device Power cord Rack mounts for 19" cabinet Screws Rackmount screws and cage nuts Rubber pads
